sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἷς

- Transliteration: heis

- Phonetic: hice

- Definition:

1. one

- Origin: (including the neuter [etc.] hen)

- TDNT entry: 09:14,2

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: (Including the neuter [etc.] ἕν hen); a primary numeral; one: - a (-n -ny certain) + abundantly man one (another) only other some. See also G1527 G3367 G3391 G3762.
